Package com.bencodez.votingplugin.specialrewards.votemilestones

Class VoteMilestoneLimit

java.lang.Object
com.bencodez.votingplugin.specialrewards.votemilestones.VoteMilestoneLimit
public final class VoteMilestoneLimit extends Object
Per-milestone retrigger limiter. Stored data is lastTriggeredMs (epoch millis).
